Own the open water.
Jaked performance swimwear.
velocx.co.nz
facebook.caption:
The pool has walls. Lines. Ropes. Everything is measured and predictable.

Open water doesn't care. 🌊

No black line to follow. No lane rope to sight off. Just you, the water, and the discipline to keep moving when your body says otherwise.

That's where the mental game gets real — and where swimmers who've trained with purpose find an edge over those who haven't.

👉 The ocean doesn't reward comfort zone training
👉 Your kit needs to move with you when the chop hits
👉 Every session you've put in the pool is currency in open water

With the Northland Triathlon just days away and NZ's open water season in full swing, now's the time to back yourself — and your gear. ✔️

Jaked suits are engineered for athletes who race everywhere. Shop the full range at velocx.co.nz
facebook.engagement_bait: Drop a 🔥 if you prefer open water over the pool — or are you strictly a black-line swimmer?
